name: Bowl of the Wife of Kit Carson
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup cooked chicken or turkey meat, in bite-sized pieces
1/4 cup Monterey Jack or Muenster Cheese, cubed
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring the chicken broth to a boil in a large pot.
2. Add the cooked chicken (or turkey), garbanzo beans, chopped chipotle pepper, rice, and oregano leaves to the boiling broth.
3. Reduce heat to maintain a simmer and cook until all ingredients are heated through.
4. Serve immediately in individual bowls.
5. Just prior to serving, add cubed cheese pieces and sliced avocado on top of each bowl.
